notes: Routes extracted from DOTr/LTFRB memorandum circulars and official press releases. DOTr website (dotr.gov.ph) blocked HTTP 403; data sourced from Philippine News Agency, MMDA, Wikipedia, and web archives of official releases. EDSA Carousel is partially covered in ltfrb-bus-franchise-database but included here with DOTr-specific details as DOTr owns the infrastructure. MC 2022-083 routes are new additions not in the LTFRB bus analysis.

routes.frequency_notes: 751 authorized buses across 87 operators; 177,000 passengers/day average (2024); 24-hr service on Taft-MCU segment; PITX-MCU operates 04:00-23:00; limited overnight midnight-04:00
routes.notes: DOTr-owned busway infrastructure. 28 km corridor. 24 active stations as of March 2025. Dedicated median lane with concrete barriers on EDSA. Mixed-traffic segments: One Ayala to Tramo (SB), Roxas Blvd to MOA (SB), MOA to PITX (SB), PITX to Roxas Blvd (NB), Taft to Ayala (NB). Source: MMDA press release July 2024, DOTr ridership reports.

routes.frequency_notes: Open-application route; frequency depends on operator compliance; launched December 26, 2022
routes.notes: Approved via LTFRB Memorandum Circular No. 2022-083. Open to any consolidated operator with new units. No ridership or frequency data published. Source: LTFRB MC 2022-083, Inquirer Dec 2022.
Approved via LTFRB MC 2022-083. Parallel route to R01 using the C-6 corridor (Circumferential Road 6). Source: Inquirer Dec 2022.

routes.destination: Southwoods Mall Transport Terminal, Biñan, Laguna
routes.notes: Approved via LTFRB MC 2022-083. Cross-boundary route connecting BGC/McKinley Hill area to Southwoods. Source: Inquirer Dec 2022.

routes.destination: Southwoods Mall Transport Terminal, Biñan, Laguna
routes.notes: Approved via LTFRB MC 2022-083. Express route from Makati CBD to Southwoods. Source: Inquirer Dec 2022.
Approved via LTFRB MC 2022-083. Inter-provincial route (NCR to Cavite). Governor's Drive (GD) is a major Cavite arterial. Source: Inquirer Dec 2022.
Approved via LTFRB MC 2022-083. Long-distance route crossing NCR from Quezon City to Cavite. Source: Inquirer Dec 2022.

routes.frequency_notes: Launched 2023 to replace PNR commuter rail service suspended for NSCR construction
routes.notes: DOTr/LTFRB replacement route for suspended PNR service. Approximate routing follows former PNR southern corridor. Source: PNA June 2023.

routes.frequency_notes: Launched 2023 to replace PNR commuter rail service suspended for NSCR construction
routes.notes: DOTr/LTFRB replacement route for suspended PNR service on FTI/Taguig segment. Source: PNA June 2023.

routes.frequency_notes: Free service; funded by Quezon City LGU; 8 routes total; expanded hours announced June 2024; 10 electric low-floor buses procured October 2024
routes.notes: QCityBus is an LGU-operated free bus service in Quezon City with 8 routes. Specific route endpoints not identified from available sources — needs dedicated investigation. Corridors include Cubao, Litex, Quirino Highway. Source: OSM Wiki aggregation, QC government announcement.

routes.frequency_notes: Free electric minibus service operated by Global Electric Transport
routes.notes: Operated by Global Electric Transport. Free service. Uses electric minibuses. Route corridor approximate. Source: OSM wiki aggregation.

routes.frequency_notes: Free electric minibus service operated by Global Electric Transport
routes.notes: Operated by Global Electric Transport. Free service. Route corridor approximate. Source: OSM wiki aggregation.
